DISCOVER MASTERPIECE

The Master
Standard.

A four-step meticulous methodology ensuring that every final print is flawlessly aligned with your corporate identity.

01. Design

Submit your assets or consult with our Kolkata & Delhi design hubs.

02. Proofing

High-fidelity physical proofs guaranteed to match the final run.

03. Crafting

Heavy-duty offset presses managed by veteran pressmen.

04. Delivery

Tracked, pristine delivery straight to your headquarters.

M. Rahman

Founder & CEO

Our Heritage

Building a Legacy in Print Since 2002

Guided by the vision of M. Rahman, Print Space India evolved from a boutique operation in Girish Park, Kolkata into a premier multi-city enterprise.

By combining elite craftsmanship with cutting-edge 2026 press technology in both our Kolkata Head Office and New Delhi Branch, we guarantee an unmatched tactile experience.

PRINT SPACE INDIA

Owned & Operated by M. Rahman.

We are your dedicated partner for high-precision luxury printing and corporate branding across India.

KOLKATA (H.O.)

Beadon Street, Near Girish Park Metro Station, Kolkata, WB-700006

+91 9876543210

NEW DELHI (B.O.)

General Inquiry

Describe your enterprise requirement and we'll route it to the Kolkata or Delhi office.
